Class ResearcherDecorator

java.lang.Object
research.ResearcherDecorator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Researcher
public class ResearcherDecorator extends Object implements Researcher, Serializable
Decorator that adds Researcher functionality to any User. Implements Decorator design pattern.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ResearcherDecorator(User user)
    Wraps a user with researcher capabilities.

    Adds paper to personal list and registers it globally in DataStorage.

    Calculates H-index based on citation counts of all papers.

    Creates a new ResearchProject with this researcher as first participant.

    Returns all projects this researcher participates in.

    Returns all research papers by this researcher.
